meta.regression_guard: Sync read-path tool — returns the full location-bible-v2 JSON directly inside `result.content[0].text` (a JSON string), NOT wrapped in another envelope. Miss path returns `{error:"not_found", bible_id}` JSON-in-200 (NOT MCP error) — clients distinguish hit/miss by presence of `bible_id` vs `$schema`. Mirrors the MCP resource at `agent://location-scout/bible/{location_id}` but is callable as a tool for clients that read tools-only. Drift signal: if `$schema` ever stops being `location-bible-v2`, every downstream consumer (ArtDirector, Cinematographer, ShotGeneration) loses its bible parser.
